title: New: Instantly Filter Real-Time Rumor Signals by Ticker with AiMyTrade’s Updated Pre-Pump Radar
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
To the r/aitrading community,

We are excited to share a new tool designed for active traders and market researchers: AiMyTrade’s updated Pre-Pump Rumor Radar now allows instant, ticker-level search and filtering of real-time market rumors, social chatter, news rumors, insider activity, and options data—all in one dashboard.

What’s New:

* Instantly search for any stock ticker (e.g., AAPL, TSLA, NVDA) to view real-time signals and market rumors compiled from multiple sources.
* No more “track” or queuing inputs—simply type to filter the live signals stream.
* Combine with sort (“Latest First”) and other advanced filters to discover actionable catalysts and early sentiment.
* Coverage spans social, news, insider, and options chatter with a single, unified interface.

Why it matters:

* Speed: Identify rumor-driven activity before official headlines.
* Depth: Broader and deeper lens on the catalyst landscape behind price action.
* Precision: Focus only on tickers or sectors relevant to your strategy.

How to try:

1. Visit AiMyTrade’s Pre-Pump Signals dashboard (Premium access required).
2. Enter a ticker in the search field.
3. Instantly review all live and historical rumors for that symbol, with relevant context and data-driven alerts.

This update is part of our ongoing effort to make real-time market sentiment and early catalyst signals more accessible to traders, quants, and market researchers.

Questions or suggestions about features or source coverage? We welcome all feedback and discussion.

— The AiMyTrade Team
